findings.evidence: The PDF centers the meeting title and location details at the top of the page. The HTML left-aligns these lines.

findings.description: Spaced text converted to a formal table with added headers.
findings.evidence: The PDF presents the agenda using spaced text and dot leaders. The HTML converts this structure into a formal bordered table and introduces a new header row ('Time', 'Topic', 'Speaker') that does not exist in the original PDF.
